title: MetaVelvet : An extension of Velvet assembler to de novo metagenome assembly from short sequence reads
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3l0nt","text":"Motivation: An important step of \"metagenomics\" analysis is the assembly of multiple genomes from mixed sequence reads of multiple species in a microbial community. Most conventional pipelines employ a single-genome assembler with carefully optimized parameters and post-process the resulting scaffolds to correct assembly errors. Limitations of the use of a single-genome assembler for de novo metagenome assembly are that highly conserved sequences shared between different species often causes chimera contigs, and sequences of highly abundant species are likely mis-identified as repeats in a single genome.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12},{"style":"italic","offset":387,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47a11","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2g6d","text":"Methods:We modified and extended a single-genome and de Bruijn-graph based assembler, Velvet, for de novo metagenome assembly. Our fundamental ideas are first decomposing de Bruijn graph constructed from mixed short reads into individual sub-graphs and second building scaffolds based on every decomposed de Bruijn sub-graph as isolate species genome.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8},{"style":"italic","offset":98,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":86,"length":6}],"data":[]},{"key":"16oim","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dj3ec","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"85go7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"A10CD63158E4406AB926613BD4CCFFB0","url":"http://www.ebi.ac.uk/~zerbino/velvet/"}},"1":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"73D509081E8743629C89D7A994818675","height":null,"is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":"fig1.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/bnmc2w6.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/bnmc2w6.png","width":null}}}}
creator: Bonnie L Hurwitz
